meta.produkt: Drapek - deska do scierania pazurow psa z WSUWANA pokrywa na smakolyki (Ali white-label)
meta.archetype: gadzet-handsPOV (ANIMAL-AS-PERFORMER: pies = performer/twarz, kanoniczny dog-ref corgi warunkuje wszystkie sceny)
meta.silniki: wszystkie sceny flf (Kling 2.5 first+last). n=2 tylko na scenie SCRATCH (ruch zwierzecia = ryzyko fizyki). HOOK z v1 zostaje (juz przyciety do czystego okna 0-1.2s).
meta.reorder_v2: hook -> board -> reward(WYSUW pokrywy) -> scratch(MONEY: drapanie + karma widoczna JEDNOCZESNIE) -> proof -> cta. Rationale: scena scratch MONEY wymaga ODSLONIETEJ wneki (karma widoczna) podczas drapania, wiec wysuw (reward) MUSI byc PRZED scratch. Anty-spoiler: przed reward pokrywa ZAMKNIETA (board = flush closed).
meta.wiernosc_0i: kanon konstrukcji: pokrywa FLUSH w plaszczyznie czarnego wierzchu, zsuwana z KONCA w bok poza obrys (NIE ramka na wierzchu, NIE panel, NIE wneka na srodku); deska = cienki 3 cm slab lezacy plasko (NIE klin); rysy = kanoniczny scratched-surface (cienkie jasnoszare, nie kredowe). Kazda klatka last = [first, ref_stanu].
meta.bramki_tomka: tryb autonomiczny - self-accept operatora z uzasadnieniem w raporcie (retro-akceptacja); realne bramki = qa_gate per klip + product_gate (0i)

wzorzec.hook_type: problem-first / callout ('if your dog HATES their nails trimmed...') + satisfying dog-digging ASMR
wzorzec.audio_character: raw-diegetic + luzne-gadanie-tworcy: sygnaturowy dzwiek = PAZURY DRAPIACE po szorstkiej desce (ASMR kopania) + zsuw drewnianej pokrywy + chrupanie karmy; pod tym cichy ambient salonu. Dzwiek produktu (drapanie) NIE MOZE wypasc z pipeline'u.

on_screen_text.text: (ANGIELSKIE napisy wzorca - NIE kopiowac; nasze VO po polsku)

loop.jak: wzorzec nie zapetlal - my domykamy petle kompozycyjnie

wzorzec.reaction_sound: satysfakcja = ASMR drapania + chrup karmy (dowod reakcji psa DZWIEKIEM, nie doklejona twarza czlowieka)
wzorzec.comment_driver: pies sam 'prosi' o pilowanie pazurow jak o zabawe; slady zarysowan na czarnej powierzchni = widoczny dowod

hook_design.typ_kreacji: problem-first / specific-outcome (pies w panice przy obcinaczkach) - jasny wysokokontrastowy kadr; ruch juz w klatce 1 (pies cofa lape)
hook_design._bramka: hook jasny, produkt/pies duzy w kadrze, ruch od klatki 1, zero intro - OK

kanon_kata: flat overhead 3/4 view about 35 degrees down onto the floor, the THIN 3 cm board lying FLAT and level on the floor plane, treat lid at its LEFT end - NOT a thick wedge, NOT a steeply tilted slab

sceny.first_frame_brief_en: BRIGHT high-key home living-room floor, warm daylight, cream sofa blurred behind; the canonical tan-and-white corgi sits on light-oak floor and PULLS its front paw back, head turned away, ears pinned back, uneasy, as a human hand holds shiny metal nail clippers approaching its paw; no board yet
sceny.last_frame_brief_en: SAME bright framing and corgi: the dog has flinched further away from the clippers, paw lifted off, head turned more, clearly avoiding - the clippers still in the hand
sceny.motion_prompt_en: the corgi flinches and pulls its paw away from the approaching metal clippers, turning its head aside with ears back, gentle handheld micro-drift, bright airy room, no morphing, exactly one dog with four legs
sceny.vo_pl: Moj pies wpadal w panike, gdy tylko wyciagalem obcinaczki.

kontrakt_produktowy.kat: n/d (brak deski w kadrze - scena problemu)
must_show: corgi cofajacy lape od obcinaczek
jasny high-key pokoj
must_not_show: scratch board (deska wchodzi dopiero w scenie board)

sceny._cut: tnij gdy pies odwraca glowe (apogeum unikania)

sceny.first_frame_brief_en: SAME bright room and corgi: a human hand lowers the unbranded Drapek board onto the light-oak floor in front of the dog. The board is a THIN 3 cm slab lying FLAT and level (NOT a wedge, NOT tilted steeply): a single continuous coarse matte-black abrasive top over a pale blonde pine body, and at its LEFT end a thin FLUSH black-topped sliding lid (its black top level and in-plane with the rest of the surface, NOT a raised wooden frame, NOT a box on top) with a short black fabric pull-loop at the corner; treat well fully hidden/closed; the corgi's ears perk up, curious
sceny.last_frame_brief_en: SAME framing: the board now rests flat and level on the floor, lid still flush-closed, the corgi leans in sniffing it, ears up, interested; plain blonde wood edge, no logo
sceny.motion_prompt_en: the hand sets the thin flat scratch board level on the floor and withdraws, the corgi leans in and sniffs it with ears perked, subtle handheld micro-drift, bright room, keep the exact board shape and thin flat slab, lid staying flush-closed, no text on the wood
sceny.vo_pl: (BEZ VO - vo_hook przelewa sie jako most nad ta scena)

kontrakt_produktowy.kat: flat overhead 3/4 ~35deg, thin 3cm slab lying flat, NOT a wedge

jedna ciagla czarna powierzchnia
pokrywa FLUSH w plaszczyznie na LEWYM koncu
czarna petla w rogu pokrywy
gladka drewniana krawedz bez napisow

sceny._cut: match-on-action: reka wychodzi z kadru gdy pies wchodzi

sceny.rola: WYSUW POKRYWY - mechanizm szuflady (THE reveal); rozbita delta wysuwu
sceny.first_frame_brief_en: SAME bright board flat on the floor, corgi beside it: a human hand grips the black pull-loop at the corner of the sliding lid at the LEFT end; the flush black lid is SLIGHTLY AJAR - just starting to slide sideways, a thin sliver of the pale wooden well beginning to show at the end (NOT fully open yet)
sceny.last_frame_brief_en: SAME framing: the black lid has slid HORIZONTALLY sideways OUT beyond the board outline at the LEFT end, fully uncovering the pale wooden well recessed at that end with a few brown kibble treats inside; the corgi dips its nose toward the open well; the lid rests as a separate black rectangle beside the board, in-plane, never lifted
sceny.motion_prompt_en: the hand pulls the black loop and the flush black lid slides HORIZONTALLY sideways out beyond the board outline, uncovering the pale wooden well with brown kibble at the end, then the corgi noses in toward a treat; the lid slides in-plane and never lifts or floats up; gentle handheld micro-drift, bright room, keep exact board shape, well stays at the end not the middle
sceny.vo_pl: A w nagrode sam wyjmuje smakolyk.

kontrakt_produktowy.kat: flat overhead 3/4 ~35deg, thin 3cm slab lying flat, NOT a wedge

drewniana wneka odslonieta na LEWYM koncu

reka na petli (first)

sceny._cut: tnij po odslonieciu wneki (dokonczenie ruchu zsuwu)

sceny.rola: MECHANIZM / DEMO - MONEY SHOT (drapanie + karma widoczna JEDNOCZESNIE, ASMR)
sceny.first_frame_brief_en: CLOSER bright shot of the board flat on the floor with the treat lid ALREADY SLID OPEN at the LEFT end (pale wooden well with brown kibble visible) - the corgi's tan-and-white front paw pressed on the coarse black abrasive surface, claws down, about to drag; a few faint fine pale-grey scuff streaks already on the black surface (NOT white chalk lines)
sceny.last_frame_brief_en: SAME close framing: the front paw has dragged down and back across the black surface leaving fresh FINE PALE-GREY claw-scuff striations (like the scratched-surface reference, NOT white chalk), the open well with kibble still visible at the end, the other front paw lifting to scratch next
sceny.motion_prompt_en: the corgi vigorously digs and scratches the coarse black abrasive board with its front paws, alternating, claws dragging down and back leaving fine pale-grey scuff streaks, while the slid-open wooden well with brown kibble stays visible at the end; natural energetic canine digging on the flat floor plane, subtle handheld, exactly one dog four legs no extra paws, no morphing, sharp rigid thin board, well stays at the end
sceny.vo_pl: Sam pituje pazurki, drapiac jak do zabawy.

sceny.first_frame_brief_en: MACRO bright close-up of the black abrasive board top now covered in many FINE PALE-GREY claw-scuff striations (proof the claws are being filed, matching the scratched-surface reference, NOT white chalk), the slid-open pale wooden well with kibble still at the LEFT end, the corgi's tan paw resting on the edge
sceny.last_frame_brief_en: SAME macro then easing back to show the calm relaxed corgi sitting content beside the scratched board in the bright room, ears relaxed, the open well still at the LEFT end
sceny.motion_prompt_en: slow gentle reveal from the fine pale-grey scratched black surface up to the calm content corgi sitting beside the flat board, the open wooden well staying at the LEFT end, bright airy room, subtle handheld, no morphing, exactly one dog, well does not teleport
sceny.vo_pl: Zero szarpania, zero stresu, a pazurki krotkie.

kontrakt_produktowy.kat: macro onto the flat scratched top, well open at LEFT end

sceny.rola: CTA + LOOP CLOSE (echo hooka: ten sam jasny pokoj, ten sam pies, problem rozwiazany); mechanizm WZOR + lapa NA desce
sceny.first_frame_brief_en: SAME bright high-key room and camera as the HOOK, same corgi in the same spot on the light-oak floor - the Drapek board in front with the flush black lid slid open at the LEFT end showing the pale wooden well with kibble, and the calm happy corgi resting its front paw ON the black board surface (product IN USE, in contact - RESOLVED echo of the anxious opening)
sceny.last_frame_brief_en: SAME framing: the corgi taps its paw once ON the board and looks up content, hero final, bright and warm - mirrors the very first shot's room and light; lid still slid open with kibble at the LEFT end
sceny.motion_prompt_en: the calm corgi rests and lightly taps its front paw ON the scratch board in the same bright room as the opening, the flush lid slid open with kibble at the end, content, subtle handheld micro-drift, the board hero and alive, no morphing, exactly one dog four legs

kontrakt_produktowy.kat: flat overhead 3/4 ~35deg matching the hook room, thin flat board, well open at LEFT end
kontrakt_produktowy.uzycie: corgi trzyma lape NA desce (produkt uzywany, nie tylko obecny) przy odslonietej wnece z karma
must_show: lapa corgi NA czarnej powierzchni deski (kontakt)
pokrywa zsunieta + wneka z karma na LEWYM koncu
ten sam jasny pokoj co hook (echo loop close)
must_not_show: pies tylko siedzacy ZA deska bez kontaktu

sceny._cut: LOOP CLOSE: ostatnia klatka = echo jasnego pokoju z hooka; audio ciagle bez akcentu-stopu

loop_close._doc: 0c LOOP CLOSE - petla kompozycyjna: ten sam jasny pokoj + ten sam corgi co w hooku, ale problem (obcinaczki/panika) zamieniony na rozwiazanie (deska/spokoj + lapa na desce). Emocjonalna inwersja = petla.
loop_close.first_frame_echo: CTA last frame = jasny high-key pokoj, corgi w tym samym miejscu na jasnej podlodze co w hooku; zamiast obcinaczek - deska z lapa na niej, zamiast paniki - spokoj
loop_close.audio_continuity: muzyka plynie przez granice petli bez domkniecia akcentem/fade; ostatni pawtap cichy
loop_close.closing_line_setup: ostatnia linia VO 'Teraz sam prosi o pielegnacje' ustawia pierwsza 'Moj pies wpadal w panike... obcinaczki'

audio.music_brief: warm playful upbeat pet-friendly acoustic-pop bed, light punchy kick and claps driving from second 0, bright ukulele/marimba, feel-good cozy home vibe, radio-ready punchy mix, constant energy until the very end, no outro, no fade out, absolutely no vocals, NO lo-fi, NO ambient; order +60% length (25s) for 14.4s creative

ambient_bed.opis: cichy cieply room-tone jasnego salonu (delikatny szum domu, subtelne echo pokoju), steady seamless, no melody

audio._sfx_regula: kazde WIDOCZNE zdarzenie fizyczne = foley-hit (bramka require_sfx). SYGNATURA = sfx_scratch (drapanie pazurow) glosniej niz muzyka; dip muzyki pod scene scratch, peak na reward (wysuw).

consistency.produkt: identyczna deska: cienki jasnodrewniany korpus (slab, nie klin) + jedna ciagla czarna szorstka powierzchnia + jedna FLUSH wysuwana pokrywa (z czarna petla) na LEWYM koncu + drewniana wneka pod pokrywa; UNBRANDED (zero PetSpany) - w KAZDEJ scenie (functional_count z KARTY)
consistency.pies: TEN SAM corgi (tan/bialy, duze uszy) we wszystkich scenach - dog-ref warunkuje kazda klatke; zero czarno-podpalanego psa wzorca
consistency.scenografia: ten sam jasny cieply salon (jasna podloga/kremowa sofa) przez calosc; zero szarego dywanu/ciemnego pokoju wzorca
consistency.tekst: zero czytelnych napisow/logo; drewniana krawedz czysta
consistency.rysy: kanoniczne cienkie jasnoszare zarysowania (scratched-surface), nie biale kredowe bazgroly
